---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for this project
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem is.

## Describe the solution you'd like
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen — new endpoint(s), schema change, behavior change, etc.

## Describe alternatives you've considered
Any alternative solutions or approaches you've considered.

## Which area does this affect?
- [ ] Auth / security
- [ ] Events / approval workflow
- [ ] Registrations / attendance
- [ ] Certificates / winners / feedback
- [ ] Venues / departments / clubs
- [ ] Reports / dashboards
- [ ] Notifications
- [ ] Infrastructure (Docker, migrations, CI)

## Additional context
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
